briefdescription.para: Comprehensive test suite for the EspUsbSerialJtag wrapper (noexcept).

detaileddescription.para: Targets ESP32-S3 / -C3 / -C6 / -H2 / -P4 — any chip with a built-in USB Serial/JTAG controller. The test exercises the full BaseUsbSerialJtag surface:

listitem.para: basic Write / Read paths (with optional host-side echo loop)
error-handling guard rails (null pointer, zero length, not-init)

detaileddescription.para: Plug a host PC into the chip's native USB port (the same one used for idf.py monitor). The interactive sub-tests will look for an echo from the host and time out cleanly when running unattended in CI.
